parameters.query:
WITH TopRecord AS
(
    SELECT TOP 1 x.Id, x."Type", "Text", MediaLink , MessageGroupedId, x.ChatId
    FROM XinhTelegramMedia x
    JOIN TelegramGroupSource tg ON x.ChatId = tg.ChatId
    WHERE 
    NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM XinhDistributionLog xl
        WHERE x.Id = xl.SourceId AND DistributionTarget <> '{{ $json.Link }}'
    )
    --AND "Status"  = 'APPROVED' -- THIS LINE WILL BE UNCOMMENT
    AND MediaLink NOT LIKE 'https://drive.google.com%' -- THIS LINE MAY BE REMOVED
    AND MessageGroupedId IS NULL -- THIS LINE WILL BE REMOVED
    AND tg.GroupType = '{{ $json.GroupType }}'
    AND x."Type" = 'FileType.PHOTO' -- THIS LINE WILL BE REMOVED 
)
SELECT x.Id, x."Type", x."Text", x.MediaLink, x.MessageGroupedId, ChatId, ca.Credentials
FROM XinhTelegramMedia x
JOIN CommunityAccount ca ON x.DriveAccount = ca."User"
WHERE 
    (SELECT MessageGroupedId FROM TopRecord) IS NULL 
    AND x.Id = (SELECT Id FROM TopRecord)
    OR 
    ( x.MessageGroupedId = (SELECT MessageGroupedId FROM TopRecord) AND x.ChatId = (SELECT ChatId from TopRecord)  )

parameters.jsCode:
let data = $('FakeWebhookRequest').first().json.body // should change to webhook

return data["DistributionTarget"]

parameters.content:
#### This can be reuse for different platform, just pass in:
1. DistributionTarget - Link (from distribution log)
2. Type of group (XINH, HAI, ...)
#### Then get the suitable media to distribute
